name: Aurora Lounge Lamp
description: A sculptural brushed-steel lamp with a warm ambient glow, designed to soften corners and add calm character to modern living spaces.

name: Marin Everyday Tote
description: A structured canvas tote with leather handles and generous interior room for work essentials, travel kits, and day-to-day carry.

name: Solstice Ceramic Set
description: A hand-finished ceramic dining set with a matte sand glaze and subtle tonal variation, built for elevated everyday meals.

name: Cinder Knit Throw
description: A soft heavyweight throw in textured charcoal knit, ideal for layering over lounge chairs, sofas, or end-of-bed styling.

name: Atlas Travel Flask
description: A double-wall stainless flask with powder-coated finish and precision sip top, made to keep drinks at the perfect temperature longer.

name: Vale Accent Chair
description: A compact accent chair with curved walnut arms and cloud-soft boucle upholstery, blending comfort with gallery-inspired form.
